initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Jersey City
initiatives.description: A grassroots mutual aid collective dedicated to recovering and sharing free vegan meals in Jersey City. They coordinate food recovery, community meals, and resource distribution while building solidarity through direct action against hunger and food waste.

initiatives.name: Jersey City Mutual Aid Society
initiatives.description: We are a group of neighbors who are working together to support our fellow neighbors. We collect donations and distribute them to people who need assistance.
